hero.title: The 18-Week English Conversation & Writing Program
hero.subtitle: A structured journey from hesitant English to confident, fluent communication — spoken and written. Taught in small groups at our centre in Matrouh.

cards.title: Speak Every Session
cards.desc: Small conversation groups mean every student talks, every class. No hiding in the back row — fluency comes from practice.

cards.title: Write for Real Life
cards.desc: Weekly workshops on the writing you actually need: emails, applications, essays, and workplace documents, with individual corrections.

cards.title: Learn at Your Level
cards.desc: A free placement test puts you in the right group, so lessons are never too easy or overwhelming.

phases.title: Foundations
phases.desc: Core grammar in context, essential vocabulary, and guided conversations that build the confidence to speak from day one.

phases.title: Fluency Building
phases.desc: Discussion-driven sessions on real-life and workplace topics, paired with weekly writing workshops covering emails and structured paragraphs.

phases.title: Mastery & Application
phases.desc: Presentations, debates, and professional writing projects — essays, reports, and formal correspondence — with individual feedback and a final assessment.

placement.title: Find your level in 15 minutes
placement.subtitle: Take our free online placement test and we'll recommend the right starting group for you — no obligation, results the same day.
placement.note: Contact us and we'll send you the test link on WhatsApp or email.

hero.title: Translation & Corporate Services
hero.subtitle: Nearly a decade of certified translation and professional communication services in Matrouh. Precise. Confidential. On time.

services.title: Document Translation
services.desc: Certified Arabic ↔ English translation of legal contracts, court documents, medical reports, academic transcripts, certificates, and personal papers. Formatted to match the original and accepted by embassies, universities, and government offices.

services.title: Interpretation
services.desc: Professional consecutive interpretation for business negotiations, medical consultations, legal proceedings, and official appointments — on-site anywhere in Matrouh or remotely by phone and video call.

services.title: Corporate Writing
services.desc: Clear, persuasive business communication in Arabic and English: proposals, official correspondence, company profiles, reports, and marketing copy that elevate how your organization is perceived.

trust.title: Confidential
trust.desc: Your documents are handled with complete discretion.

trust.title: Fast Turnaround
trust.desc: Standard documents often delivered within 24–48 hours.

quote.title: Request a Free Quote
quote.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll reply within one business day with pricing and timeline.

hero.title: About Egyptos Centre
hero.subtitle: Matrouh's home for languages and translation since 2016.

story: Egyptos Centre for Languages and Translation opened its doors in Matrouh in 2016 with a simple conviction: our city deserved the same quality of language education and professional translation available in Cairo and Alexandria — without the distance.

What began as a small translation office has grown into a full-service centre. Today we provide certified document translation trusted by embassies and institutions, interpretation for businesses and families, corporate writing services, and a language academy whose flagship 18-Week English Conversation and Writing Program has helped hundreds of students find their voice in English.
We remain proudly local. Our team knows the community we serve, and every student and client works directly with us — in person, here in Matrouh.

cards.title: Our Mission
cards.desc: To elevate education and corporate communication in Matrouh through rigorous language teaching and precise, trustworthy translation.

cards.title: Our Values
cards.desc: Accuracy without compromise, confidentiality in everything we handle, and patient, encouraging teaching that meets students where they are.

cards.title: Our Promise
cards.desc: Every document delivered on time and embassy-ready. Every student supported from placement test to completion certificate.

aboutPage.rootedBody: Visit our centre, meet the team, and see why families and businesses across the governorate have trusted us for nearly a decade.
